scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

workspace_split.left_panel: w-full md:w-1/3 h-full overflow-y-auto border-r border-stone-200 p-6
workspace_split.right_preview: hidden md:flex md:w-2/3 h-full bg-stone-100 items-center justify-center p-8 overflow-y-auto

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#00227a] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-stone-900 border border-stone-200 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors
buttons.ai_action: bg-amber-50 text-amber-900 border border-amber-200 rounded-none px-4 py-2 hover:bg-amber-100 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

components.inputs: rounded-none border-stone-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:border-transparent bg-white w-full
components.cards: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-none p-6 transition-all hover:shadow-md hover:border-stone-300

media_and_images.description: Abstract Swiss poster design for the main landing page hero section
Floating blank document representing the builder workspace
Minimalist desk setup for blog post
Silver smartphone and laptop on desk for ATS guide

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use purple, violet, or teal anywhere. Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) as the brand primary and Amber for AI-related actions.
CRITICAL: Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Do not default to Inter or Roboto.
For the marketing pages, prioritize pure HTML/Tailwind to allow structural overlap and bento grids without strict constraints.
For the dashboard and builder app, utilize heavily customized Shadcn components (strip out heavy border radii to match the 'rounded-none' brutalist/editorial aesthetic).

Workspace Builder Layout: Left side contains the accordion/forms. Right side contains the live preview. Ensure the preview panel is visually distinct (a darker canvas behind a white A4 paper representation).
AdSense / Affiliates: Design specific 'Card' components for AdSense placeholders and affiliate links that blend into the Swiss grid, ensuring they do not disrupt the professional UX.
The 5 templates (Modern Professional, Minimal ATS, Creative, Student, Corporate) should have distinct layout CSS but draw from the same clean typographic scales.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React with sharp, thin stroke weights to match the typographic feel.
